core_mechanism: decomposition of a symmetry's representation into the irreducible components of an embedded subsymmetry via an alternating-sign (signed) summation over the orbits of an associated finite reflection group (a Racah-Speiser-type folding algorithm)
brief_reason: The abstract gives a closed formula for branching coefficients of an embedding built from an affine extension that yields an algorithm explicitly called an analog of the Racah-Speiser algorithm, i.e. a signed sum over Weyl-reflection images to extract multiplicities.
